text.title: Weekly PM Async Broadcast Template Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example of Weekly PM Async Broadcast Template producing a valid report artefact, anonymised for portability.

step.name: trigger
step.text: An instance of the recurring task that Weekly PM Async Broadcast Template solves arrived in the operator's inbox. Applies-If all held; no Skip-If triggered.

step.name: gather-prerequisites
step.text: The operator collected each prerequisite per the AGENTS.md table; every artefact had a verifiable source path.

step.name: apply-rules
step.text: The operator walked every rule in content/01-core-rules.xml; the rule list passed; evidence was attached per rule with source_type.

step.name: produce
step.text: The artefact was filled using templates/weekly-pm-async-broadcast-template.md; the structured payload mirrored templates/weekly-pm-async-broadcast-template.schema.json.

step.name: validate
step.text: Ran scripts/validate-weekly-pm-async-broadcast-template.py --file draft.json; exit 0; the artefact shipped to the named consumer.

text.example: Applies-If held → inputs reachable → rules walked → artefact filled → validator returned 0 → owner signed off → downstream consumer registered.
